title: American-Style Chicken Curry
description: A classic American-inspired take on Indian curry, featuring tender chicken and a rich, tangy sauce.

ingredients.name: tangy sauce
ingredients.notes: such as ketchup or American-style BBQ sauce

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tangy sauce and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
